stages.name: Research
stages.prompt_guide:
## Your Task
Research and analyze the topic described in the task.

1. Read the task description carefully
2. Gather information from relevant sources
3. Analyze findings and identify key insights
4. Write a research summary to docs/reports/

## Completion
When done: /bt:update {workflow_id} {task_id} status=done

stages.name: Documentation
stages.prompt_guide:
## Your Task
Document the findings from the research stage.

1. Read the research summary from the previous stage
2. Structure findings into a clear, navigable document
3. Include recommendations and next steps
4. Save the final document to docs/plans/ or docs/reports/

## Completion
When done: /bt:update {workflow_id} {task_id} status=done
